steps.title: Find the linear scale factor
steps.content:
For similar solids, the ratio of surface areas equals the square of the linear scale factor.

$$\frac{\text{SA of }Y}{\text{SA of }X} = \frac{1{,}475}{59} = 25$$

So the linear scale factor from $X$ to $Y$ is $\sqrt{25} = 5$.

steps.title: Apply the cube to volumes and sum
steps.content:
The ratio of volumes equals the cube of the linear factor: $5^{3} = 125$. So $\text{Vol}_{X} = \dfrac{\text{Vol}_{Y}}{125} = \dfrac{1{,}500}{125} = 12$.

$$\text{Sum} = 12 + 1{,}500 = 1{,}512$$

The answer is 1512.
